programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: A tile supply company had been given a rubber cheque by a contractor for ceramic floor tiles. An effort to locate the contractor brought them to the doorstep of the homeowner, who was having the tile installed in their home. The tile supplier was told that the contractor had abandoned the job weeks earlier and disappeared, also leaving them with a half completed kitchen and badly installed tiles. Disgusted by the poor workmanship and saddened by the emotional state of the homeowners, the tile supplier offered that he would try and figure out a way to help them. They called Mike Holmes and offered to donate all new materials if Holmes On Homes would do the installation. Inspired by this act of generosity, Mike and the team roll up their sleeves to make it all come together- and complete the unfinished kitchen as well.

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.desc: For Mary, her idyllic view is the gently rolling and lush hills that define and shape Prince Edward Island. Will she find those views and the property for her expanding family?

programme.title: What's For Sale?
programme.desc: Exuberant entertainers, and soon to be empty-nesters, Heidi and Mike want a new kind of nest for the family to come home to. It's got to be big and beautiful because it's also going to be a place for the couples many friends to party!

programme.title: What's For Sale?
programme.desc: Country Music singer/songwriter/Chum FM radio personality Meredith Shaw is looking for a place to getaway and get creative whenever she can escape her city condo. ↵Her friend, comedian Andrew Johnston, contributes his own priorities to Meredith's wishlist from the perspective of a future guest of her cottage retreat!↵

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.desc: Ali and Mark love the view of a vibrant and active harbour. They are searching for a home with views of a busy harbour a place where float planes buzz by and marine life frolics.

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.desc: For Camil, living downtown with views of an ever-changing cityscape is what jazzes him. His family is growing up so he's looking for a bigger home with killer views of an exciting skyline.

programme.title: What's For Sale?
programme.desc: Gill and Tom are an active couple who dream of a weekend getaway in Collingwood, where they can bike, ski, snowboard and fish all year round. After seeing a townhouse with a big basement surprise, a fixer-upper ski chalet and a condo near the mountain, which one will they choose?

programme.title: What's For Sale?
programme.desc: Midland restaurant owners Rob and Jenn have traveled the world for most of their lives. Now, they're looking for a vacation home their family can enjoy a little closer to home. WIth $500,000 to spend, will they choose the octagon-shaped cottage, the Mexican-style casa, or the cabin in the woods?

programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View
programme.sub-title: Island archipelago / Island retreat (Salt Spring island)
programme.desc: Katherine and Aaron dream of an oasis with incredible views of dotted islands and serene waters. A warm and welcoming place for their family and friends on the Pacific shores of Canada.

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Jasmine and Kevin see Real Potential
programme.desc: They first thought buying a home would be easy. Seven months later Jasmine and Kevin are still living in a hotel room, undecided whether they should live downtown or in the suburbs. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes, betting that she can help them bridge their location tug of war. Once Jasmine and Kevin buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that puts a lasting polish on a diamond in the rough!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Christa and Mike see Real Potential
programme.desc: How's this for pressure? Christa and Mike have 30-days to buy, seven-week old baby in tow! Sarah shows these two the potential of three suburban homes, each with fewer stairs than their current townhouse. Good thing, as Mike breaks his leg part way through the search. Once Christa and Mike buy, Sarah tears apart and renovates their deal breaker room, giving them a treat they so deserve!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Evette and Jason see Real Potential
programme.desc: After two-years of renting in the suburbs Evette and Jason are ready to commit. The issue: while the houses they've been viewing hare new, they're surprisingly not very well cared for. Sarah shows them the potential of three suburban homes, trying to mitigate the quirks they've seen time and again. Once Evette and Jason buy, Sarah wrangles sense and style into the one room in their new home that remains a puzzle!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Vanessa and Troy see Real Potential
programme.desc: Vanessa and Troy are blending their two condos into one home they can finally call their own. Trouble is, when viewing homes Vanessa can't help but be swayed by the homeowners' taste to make an informed decision. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes, helping this pair see past aesthetics. Once Vanessa and Troy buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that for them is the biggest disaster!

programme.title: Building the Dream: Colorado
programme.sub-title: This Home Bar Has It's Own Keg And A Built-In Wine Chiller
programme.desc: In this episode General and Cristina Judd from Me and General Design tackle the playroom. This family-friendly lounge is packed with everything you need for your pod. From a surfboard sound system to a bar with a mini kitchen with its own and not to mention a beer tap. If this bar is the place to be then we don't know what is.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Colorado

programme.desc: When you have an unobstructed view of the Rocky Mountains as your backdrop, basic goes out the window. For Houston designer Lucinda Loya, this space is much more than a living room. With a floor-to-ceiling fireplace, gallery art and an oversized sectional this is the perfect spot for working from home, lounging with family, or watching the sunset.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati's family is the perfect example of cultures colliding – Mexican and American. The happy result is the creation of unique and tasty recipes. Pati dives deep into the blending of these cultures and comes up with some classic American recipes that have a delicious Mexican twist. She also takes us to a local restaurant where she learns the owner's own unique Mex-American story.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is throwing a picnic for family and friends in her backyard. She'll make some of her favorite “picnic foods” and serve everyone outside picnic-style. It also happens to be her husband Dany's birthday, so a big surprise is in store!

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Street food has always been popular, but these days it's booming as more and more chefs are bringing food trucks and stands to the streets! In this episode, Pati visits the city of Guanajuato, known for having some of the best street food in all of Mexico, to highlight some of her favorites. Then, she shows us how we can recreate some of them in our own kitchens.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: This show is all about Pati's middle son, Sami. Being stuck in the middle of first born, Alan, and Mr. Personality himself, Juju, isn't always easy for Sami. programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Mexican cuisine is full of long-standing traditional recipes and techniques. But there are many chefs bringing new ideas to the table, giving a modern twist to Mexican cooking. In this episode, Pati meets two chefs in Mexico City who are putting modern spins on this age-old cuisine. She then taps into that creativity to show us her ideas for how we can “modernize” our Mexican kitchen.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Every family has passed-down recipes, and Pati's is no exception. Food has always been a central part of her family life. She'll show us a couple recipes that were passed down to her, as well as a recipe she hopes to pass down to her sons. Also, meet Pati's mom and sister, as she joins them for lunch at one of their favorite restaurants in Mexico City.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Mexican cuisine is chock-full of grilled, roasted, fried and frozen recipes, but for those looking to expand their repertoire with some baked recipes, this episode is for you! Today, Pati's Mexican Table becomes Pati's Mexican Bakery with a variety of simple recipes – all of which bake right in the oven.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Monk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Sonia's recovery takes another unexpected turn when she goes too far with a debtor. Sonia and Matt sneak onto a big studio lot to repossess a trailer, but there's a big surprise in store when it turns out Matt and the movie's star have a checkered history, Lou and Sonia interrupt a knitting circle to take a car from a booze-soaked craft enthusiast, and Matt and Froy head out to wine country for a disastrous run-in with a group of debtors who have sworn an oath of silence.

programme.title: Super-Sonia
programme.desc: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia snaps and puts herself on the business end of a knife and the gangbanger wielding it. Froy and Sonia wind up in the middle of a relationship dispute with an absent-minded professor who's got too many cars and too many girlfriends, Matt and Froy confront a debtor with a tiny motorcycle and an enormous mean streak, and Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in the middle of a gang dispute gone horribly awry.

programme.title: Interview with the Repo Man
programme.desc: The repo team confronts the toughest challenge yet: one-on-one interviews with an anger management specialist. Lyndah and Froy head to the Hollywood Hills to find a luxury sedan.

programme.title: Disaster at the Derby
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah find themselves surrounded by a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car, Lou and Sonia get lost in translation when they're forced to contend with a pair of Russian movers and their yuppie lawyer clients, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are in a battle of the scams when they try to trick a group of con artists into giving up their vehicle.

programme.title: The Trouble with Tractors
programme.desc: The team's work with the anger management specialist starts to pay off with disastrous consequences. Sonia and Froy drive to the country to repo a tractor and are forced to confront a group of irate corporate hayriders, Lou and Sonia wrangle with a confused lady who is missing both her car and her sense of decency, and Matt and Sonia get into a Mexican standoff with a wealthy divorcee, his daughter, and her rageaholic boyfriend.

programme.title: Welcome Back Rotter
programme.desc: Matt and Froy crash the meeting of a fraternal lodge to ask for a car, but instead they get an angry old man with a rifle. Froy and Matt go on a repo that turns into a battle royale.

programme.title: Crunch Time
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy interrupt a debtor and two maids who are getting hands-on with their job. A confrontation with construction workers goes bad, and somebody's vehicle will get destroyed.

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia try to repossess a car from a yuppie with a flair for the arts and for mayhem, Sonia, Matt, and Froy reclaim some unusual equipment from an overgrown hippie with some long hair and a short temper, and Matt and Sonia interrupt a house party to ask for a vehicle, but soon find themselves fighting for their lives against a troupe of enraged fire dancers.

programme.title: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy show off their best moves against a team of dance instructors who will stop at nothing to hold onto their car. Matt and Sonia repossess a vehicle from a woman with the world's most vindictive boyfriend. Lou and Froy match muscle, wits with a gang of vicious roadies.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Sam Heughan, Designed by Drew: Bedroom, Drew's News
programme.desc: “Outlander” star Sam Heughan stops by to chat. Then, Design Week continues with an allnew Designed by Drew, with Drew helping one deserving couple transform their bedroom into an oasis. Plus, “Elle Décor” Editor-In-Chief Asad Syrkett joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Seth Meyers, Britt Lower, 7-Minute Meal with Chef Pilar Valdes
programme.desc: Late Night host Seth Meyers stops by to chat about his new book, “I'm Not Scared, You're Scared.” Plus, “Severance” star Britt Lower chats with Drew. Then, it's 7 Minute Meals with Chef Pilar Valdes whipping up a Sauteed Shrimp with Chermoula Sauce dish.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: "A League of Their Own" star Abbi Jacobson opens up about her recent engagement, her bestie Ilana Glazer, what it was like co-creating, writing, producing and starring in "A League of Their Own" and more! Plus, Drew has a big surprise in store for Abbi! Abbi also joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk covering everything from the great bedding debate, the adult soccer fest taking Tennessee by storm and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Drewber" with Mille Bobbie Brown, Drew's News
programme.desc: It's an all-new Drewber, when "Enola Homes 2" star Mille Bobby Brown, joins Drew in her minivan to chat while cruising around NYC dishing on her worst fear, her dream role, which "Stranger Things" cast member is her bff and more! Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering the new royal rom-com plus a mystical mermaid sighting. They're also sharing the scoop on a local library featuring books exclusively by black women authors and have a big surprise in store!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Jamie Oliver, Ariana DeBose, Ambush Holiday Décor with Mikel
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver stops by to chat about his new cookbook, “Together.” Then, “West Side Story” star Ariana DeBose joins Drew to discuss playing Anita in the highly anticipated new film. Plus, celebrity designer Mikel Welch is helping members of The Lower East Side Girls Club surprise their program manager with all new holiday décor for their center this year.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Charlamagne Tha God, Drew & Pilar Turkey Roulade, Drew Gooder:TeacherAdoption
programme.desc: Actresses America Ferrera & Karrie Martin Lachney on their Netflix series “Gentefied.” Then, in all new Designed by Drew: Drew surprises the first career female firefighter in the city of Long Beach NY and her fellow firefighters with a firehouse den makeover. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are joined at the Drew's News desk by “Entertainment Tonight” Co-Host Nischelle Turner.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Cooking with Carla Hall, Annaleigh Ashford, Drew's News
programme.desc: Chef Carla Hall is joining Drew and whipping up some delicious dishes and shares what inspired her to write her new children's book, “Carla and the Christmas Cornbread.” Plus, “B Positive” star Annaleigh Ashford stops by to chat. Then, it's an all new Drew's News where Drew and Ross Mathews serve the news sunny-side up. Pop Quiz Week continues, where every day one in-studio audience member will play for a chance win time in a money booth filled with $10,000.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Elizabeth Banks, Drew's News with Law Roach
programme.desc: Actress and Director Elizabeth Banks reveals behind the scenes secrets about some of her most famous films and shares why her new film "Call Jane" is so important to her. Plus, fashion guru and designer Law Roach joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to tackle the latest headlines including if you should be truthful about your friends fashion choices to the rise of clapback t-shirts and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tamera Mowry Housley opens up about sharing her spicy to-do list with her husband in her new memoir, "You Should Sit Down For This!," the possibility of a "Sister, Sister" reboot and more! Plus, Tamera shares an easy DIY fall decor project of turning your pumpkin into a flower vase. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up including a woman who went viral for sending her resume on a cake to Nike to try to score an interview.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Beauty Week Kick-Off, Michele Pfeiffer, Katie Sturino
programme.desc: Drew kicks off Beauty Week revealing 100 beauty tips and giving head-to-toe makeovers to deserving viewers all week long! Actress Michelle Pfeiffer joins Drew to share her favorite tips and discuss her award-winning fragrance Henry Rose. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are joined at the Drew's News desk by Megababe Founder and body acceptance champion Katie Sturino.

programme.desc: Sika's Safari Adventure starts in the Northern Kruger National Park in the Limpopo Province, where THE OUTPOST Lodge rests high on a hill encompassed by stunning vistas of the Luvuvhu River set in the Makuleke Region that falls in the epicentre of the Great Limpopo Park, which comprises Kruger National Park, the Gaza National Park in Mozambique and the Gonarezhou National Park in Zimbabwe. Designed by an Italian born architect, Enrico Daffonchio using simple, clean lines and combining elements of steel and canvas, the stunning contemporary design of this Luxury Kruger Park Lodge emphasizes its beautiful surrounds but blends in with the Wilderness that is it's home.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Jamala Madikwe, Madikwe Game Reserve, North West Province
programme.desc: JAMALA MADIKWE, Sika's second Safari destination has been awarded “Most Romantic Lodge in South Africa” and is set around a Game-rich waterhole in the malaria-free Madikwe Game Reserve of the North West Province along the border of Botswana. Once an area consisting mainly of Cattle farms before it was transformed into a Wildlife Reserve in the early 90's. Today, the Reserve supports a thriving and incredible diversity of Species due to the fact that it lies in an ecological transition zone between the Kalahari and Lowveld Wilderness.
